purpose: Paid machine-readable temporal intelligence bundles for autonomous agents.
primary_value: Refinery lets autonomous agents buy fresh structured intelligence before they act.

purchase_flow.result: Agent selects a bundle_id and reads price/payment metadata.
Returns request_id, amount, receiver, asset, chain, expiry, and verification URL.
Agent sends the required Polygon USDC transfer to the returned receiver address.
If valid, Refinery creates an access grant.
Returns the paid machine-readable intelligence payload.

recommended_first_bundle.why: Useful before time-sensitive Solana transaction execution, routing, or infrastructure decisions.
buy_when: before submitting a time-sensitive Solana transaction
when RPC latency may affect execution
when deciding whether to delay, retry, or reroute

agent_error_recovery.payment_required: Create a payment request, submit USDC payment, then verify.
agent_error_recovery.payment_pending: Retry verification after a short delay.
agent_error_recovery.already_processed: Use the existing request_id to retrieve access or bundle payload.
agent_error_recovery.access_denied: Verify payment or create a new payment request.

fastest_purchase_path.step_2: Send exact Polygon USDC amount to the returned receiver address
fastest_purchase_path.step_4: GET the returned bundle_url or call /payments/usdc/bundle with request_id

payment_design_note: Refinery prices intelligence in USD and currently settles through Polygon USDC. Agents should use the live recommended asset unless another asset is explicitly marked live.
